yamlSnippets.build:
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: dotnet build -c Release
yamlSnippets.test:
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: dotnet test --no-build -c Release
yamlSnippets.publish:
jobs:
  publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: dotnet publish -c Release -o ./out
yamlSnippets.docker:
jobs:
  docker:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: docker build -t portfolio-api .
      - run: docker push ghcr.io/org/portfolio-api
yamlSnippets.deploy:
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: docker compose pull
      - run: docker compose up -d --build
